name: CM_PICKER_VERTICAL1ST_ITEM
description: Individual item for VerticalList1stDepth with position-based vertical offset animation. TOP position: +12px, MID: -19px (if has value) or 0px, LOW: -12px. Supports enabled/disabled states (gray when disabled). Text centered in 94px cell.
visualForm: Text item (300x94px) with position-based vertical offset, centered 36px white/gray text, smooth transitions
descriptionKo: 위치 기반 수직 오프셋 애니메이션이 있는 1차 세로 피커의 개별 항목입니다. TOP: +12px, MID: -19px(값 있을 때)/0px, LOW: -12px 오프셋이 적용되며, 비활성 상태(회색)를 지원합니다.
descriptionEn: Individual item for VerticalList1stDepth with position-based vertical offset animation. TOP position: +12px, MID: -19px (if has value) or 0px, LOW: -12px. Supports enabled/disabled states (gray when disabled). Text centered in 94px cell.
